description_long: A tall adult figure is dressed in a striking, theatrical outfit featuring a high top hat with a wide brim and a prominent band. The individual wears a fitted, long-sleeve bodysuit with asymmetrical armor plating on the right shoulder and forearm, giving a dramatic, almost fantasy-inspired appearance. The chest is adorned with a bold, circular emblem, and the left arm is less armored, suggesting a design focused on both protection and style. The pants are slim and tucked into knee-high boots, which are sturdy and practical for urban movement. The gloves are long and fitted, matching the overall sleek and slightly futuristic aesthetic. The face is partially obscured by the hat, adding an air of mystery to the character.
description: A tall adult in a dramatic, armored costume with a high top hat, fitted bodysuit, and knee-high boots. The outfit features asymmetrical armor and a bold chest emblem, blending theatrical and urban fantasy styles.
description_view_0: Front view shows the high top hat, bold chest emblem, asymmetrical armor on the right shoulder and forearm, and fitted bodysuit.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the layered armor on the right arm and the profile of the tall hat, with boots and gloves visible.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the back of the hat, the continuation of the armor on the right side, and the fitted nature of the suit and boots.
description_view_3: Right side view shows the less-armored left arm, the fitted gloves, and the overall slim silhouette of the figure.
attribute_clothing_type: theatrical armored costume with fitted bodysuit, asymmetrical armor, and high top hat
attribute_hairstyle: short hair mostly covered by hat
